EMAIL 1 - NONE TEMPLATE:
Subject: New FabricSafe user - excited to get started!

Hi FabricSafe team,

I just finished setting up my FabricSafe account and wanted to introduce myself! I'm Alicia, and I'm a textile designer working primarily with home furnishing fabrics.

I've heard great things about FabricSafe from colleagues in the industry, so I'm really looking forward to using it for my fabric safety reviews. It'll be nice to have a reliable system in place for checking materials before I move forward with production.

I'll probably be submitting my first few fabrics for review later this week once I finish organizing my current project files. Thanks for creating such a useful tool!

Best,
Alicia

Subject: Quick hello and thank you

Hey there,

Just wanted to send a quick note now that I've been exploring the FabricSafe app a bit more. The interface is really intuitive and I love how clearly everything is organized!

I'm still getting familiar with all the features, but so far I'm impressed. It's nice to have a professional tool for fabric safety evaluation. I can already tell this is going to make my workflow a lot smoother.

Looking forward to submitting some projects soon!

Cheers,
Alicia
